text.title: Application Layer: CQRS with MediatR Commands and Queries
text.summary: MediatR Command + FluentValidation Validator + Handler, and read Query with AsNoTracking projection via AutoMapper ProjectTo.

rule.statement: One Command/Query per folder (Application/Users/Commands/CreateUser/{Command,Validator,Handler}). Agents read one folder per task without scrolling.
rule.rationale: Placing all Commands in one file forces agents to scan hundreds of lines to find the relevant handler. One folder per Command/Query keeps context bounded and enables parallel agent work without conflicts.

rule.statement: CancellationToken on every async Handle signature; plumb from controller through handler to DbContext. Enforce via Roslynator rule MA0042.
rule.rationale: Without CancellationToken, client disconnects leave orphaned DB transactions and threads. Roslynator catches missing CT parameters in code review.
